case_title: MARIA GUERRA VS. ALEXANDRE PINHEIRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRA, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT PINHEIRO, ALEXANDRE DBA GISELE'S DAYCARE LOYOLA, GISELE DBA GISELE'S DAYCARE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUERRA, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINHEIRO, ALEXANDRE DBA GISELE'S DAYCARE LOYOLA, GISELE DBA GISELE'S DAYCARE $6,182.38 PRINCIPAL, $81.09 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,488.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
